name: cloudflare-wasteland
description: Wasteland: hosted Wasteland service with Kilo auth/billing proxy

scripts.deploy:prod: wrangler deploy --env="" --outdir dist --var SENTRY_RELEASE:$(sentry-cli releases propose-version)
scripts.sentry:sourcemaps: _SENTRY_RELEASE=$(sentry-cli releases propose-version) && sentry-cli releases new $_SENTRY_RELEASE --org=kilo-code --project=wasteland-service && sentry-cli sourcemaps upload --org=kilo-code --project=wasteland-service --release=$_SENTRY_RELEASE --strip-prefix 'dist/..' dist
